CONTENT.Club career: A native of Freiburg, Schmidt joined the city's giant SC Freiburg from Emmendingen in 2017. He was promoted to the senior team in 2023 after spending three years with the reserves team. He made his professional debut on 17 March 2023 in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 game against Juventus.
CONTENT.Personal life: He was born to a German father and a mother of Vietnamese descent.
CONTENT.External links: Kenneth Schmidt at Soccerway.comKenneth Schmidt at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Schmidt has represented Germany at youth international level.

SUMMARY: Tan-Kenneth Jerico Leka-Schmidt (born 3 June 2002), known as Kenneth Schmidt, is a German footballer who plays as a left-back or centre-back for Bundesliga club SC Freiburg.
